title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | June 16, 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Add slowly; in consolidation. Major beneficiary of the Gujarat semiconductor plant; can rally easily to ~1,500 long-term.
recommendations.detail: Add slowly/quietly; in consolidation mode; good long-term returns. Gujarat semiconductor plant in take-off stage, a major beneficiary; stock can easily rally to 1,500. (Buy.)

recommendations.note: Buy; accumulate slowly alongside CG Power.
recommendations.detail: Buy (add slowly along with CG Power).

recommendations.note: Do NOT buy at current levels; wait for a significant correction after the unusual rally.
recommendations.detail: Do NOT buy at current levels; wait for a significant correction. Unusual rally (gave extraordinary returns; ~2,000 at the Hyderabad workshop, now ~3,700); wait and watch. (Note: City Pulse reference — fell to ~1,300, recovered to ~2,000 — appears garbled in captions.)

recommendations.note: Sector-wide weakness, high ~80 P/E; stuck holders may exit 130-135; this quarter could be better.
recommendations.detail: HOLD (huge pan-India presence). Sector-wide weakness (all hotel stocks fell); no company-specific problem, but concern over management contracts coming up for revision and possible margin impact (flagged in last earnings call). Corrected more than peers (down to ~110); high valuation (~80 P/E) due to larger equity/liquidity; may take time. Around 130–135, short-term stuck holders may exit. Hotel sector hurt by geopolitical/aviation disruptions; May figures (e.g., GMR) recovered post-war effect as holiday season began — this quarter could be better.

recommendations.note: Adding OK (bought at 84 is fine); but do not buy at all-time high (~200 P/E) and book partial profits.
recommendations.detail: Can still add; bought at 84 is fine. Was a penny stock, gave ~10x returns. But do NOT buy at all-time high (P/E reached ~200 level); book partial profits.

recommendations.note: Fully priced; already discounted the good results, limited steam. Prefer Standard Glass instead.
recommendations.detail: As of now FULLY PRICED; results came in well but the stock already discounted/rallied (315–320 → ~400; trading ~385–389); only limited further steam. Prefer Standard Glass (Standard Glass Lining Technology) instead — risen well but entry can still be taken; good results likely ahead. (His suggested alternative.)

recommendations.note: Preferred over HLE Glascoat; risen well but entry still possible, good results likely ahead.
Sell in rallies; shifting to Amara Raja is acceptable.
recommendations.detail: Sell in rallies (OK to exit); shift to Amara Raja acceptable.

recommendations.note: Hold long term; Sri City mega plant completing ~next year, should cross 2,000+.
recommendations.detail: HOLD long term; don't sell. Sri City mega plant under construction (completing ~next year); stock should easily cross 2,000+.

recommendations.note: Buy with fresh capital; acceptable destination if exiting Bajaj Housing Finance.
recommendations.detail: If fresh capital available, can put in / buy.

recommendations.note: Do NOT sell to switch into CG Power; let profits run (~200% up). Use fresh capital instead.
recommendations.detail: Do NOT sell to switch into CG Power. Learn to let profits run (in ~200% profit). Interchanging good stocks unnecessarily is pointless; CG Power is also a good stock — use fresh capital rather than swapping.

recommendations.note: Add now; crashed on divestment-delay rumours but improving daily. Sale due this FY -> stock turns 100-plus.
recommendations.detail: Can ADD now (held 500 at 102, in loss). Disinvestment was delayed/rumored stalled, causing a crash, but consolidating with day-on-day improvement; will be sold this financial year and stock will turn 100-plus by then.

recommendations.note: Hold/buy small for long term; some profit booking possible once NSE also lists.
recommendations.detail: Both can be HOLD / bought for long term (small positions). NSE IPO draft filing this week; these may be fine until NSE lists, then some profit booking possible once all three (MCX/BSE/NSE) are listed.

recommendations.note: Hold/buy small for long term; some profit booking possible once NSE also lists.
Watchlist; price discovery ongoing (Aluminium/Power/Oil&Gas/Iron&Steel) — be cautious.
recommendations.detail: Watchlist them. As of this session: Iron & Steel in 5% upper circuit; Power flat; Oil & Gas 5% down circuit; Aluminium in down circuit. (Listing-day prices: Aluminium closed >520, Power ~42, Oil & Gas ~38–39, Iron & Steel ~21–22.) Price discovery ongoing — be cautious.
